name: CI cannot provide commit details cleanly to Chromatic
query: Chromatic warned that it could not determine commit details.
context: The user is on a custom CI integration and the build was created without enough SHA, branch, or slug information for future comparisons to behave predictably.
expected_behavior: Explains why commit details matter for future baselines and comparisons
Requests one exact invocation snippet or forwarding change
success_criteria: The response explains the consequence on future comparisons
